creator: sfoster@mailbox.myzen.co.uk
text:
The port has dependencies on some eastern language ports.

Using portmaster:
===>>> The following actions will be taken if you choose to proceed:
        Upgrade en-freebsd-doc-50088,1 to en-freebsd-doc-50402,1
        Install chinese/arphicttf
        Install chinese/ttfm
        Install print/adobe-cmaps
        Install japanese/font-ipa
        Install korean/nanumfonts-ttf

ports revision is 444702
